steps.t: You should talk to Thorlind, who can be found in Loeglond.
You should travel to Esgaroth-of-old, which is located east of Loeglond.
The voices were coming from somewhere in the ruins of Esgaroth-of-old, upon the Long Lake. You should investigate the voices, listening when you can a…
You should talk to Thorlind, who can be found just outside of Esgaroth-of-old.
